title: Tasty Dutch Barley Wrap
description: A malty, juicy wrap with tender barley, sweet vegetables, and mild turkey, perfect for kids and nut‑free families.
instructions: Rinse the pearl barley under cold water and drain.
In a medium pot, bring 500 ml of water to a boil, add the barley, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes until tender.
While the barley cooks, heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until fragrant, then add sweet potato, carrot, and zucchini; cook for 5 minutes.
Add the ground turkey to the skillet, cooking until browned and no longer pink, about 7 minutes.
Stir in cooked barley, soy sauce, and honey; season with salt, pepper, and smoked paprika, and cook for another 3 minutes.
Warm the spinach tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave for 10 seconds to make them pliable.
Spoon the barley mixture evenly onto each tortilla, leaving a small border.
Fold the sides inward and roll tightly, securing with a toothpick if desired.
Serve the wraps warm, optionally with a side of plain yogurt or a fresh salad.
